name_en: Top-tier Original M81551 Cross Grain Green. This classic pocket wallet showcases the delicate texture of Taïga leather, subtly highlighting the lettering. Card slots and interior dividers add functional details and can fit into most pockets. Detailed features 8 x 11 x 1 cm (Length x Height x Width)
